label: Gemini CLI
description: Google's open-source terminal AI agent powered by Gemini 3. Free tier: 60 req/min and 1,000 req/day with a personal Google account. Runs non-interactively with -p flag. Full workspace context, built-in Google Search grounding, file operations, and shell commands.
authNote: No API key needed for free tier. Three auth options below — pick one.

authMethods.label: Option 1 — Google OAuth (free, recommended)
authMethods.note: Opens your browser. Free quota: 60 req/min · 1,000 req/day with any personal Google account.

authMethods.label: Option 2 — Gemini API key
authMethods.note: Get a key at aistudio.google.com/apikey — paste it in your shell profile or set it in Dashboard → Providers.

authMethods.label: Option 3 — Vertex AI (enterprise / GCP)
authMethods.cmd: export GOOGLE_CLOUD_PROJECT=your_project_id && gcloud auth application-default login
authMethods.note: For Google Cloud users — uses your GCP project quota.

traits: Free tier: 60 req/min and 1,000 req/day with personal Google account
Gemini 3 models with 1M token context window
Built-in Google Search grounding for real-time info
